pr.title: perf(web): abertura ultra-rápida (LCP) e responsividade hero
pr.body:
## Objetivo Reduzir tempo até conteúdo útil na Home (**meta < 3s** em mobile) e manter responsividade em smartphone, tablet e desktop. ## Alterações - **Critical path**: removidas Google Fonts; poster hero 1200px com `srcset` e preload leve - **Hero**: vídeo Pexels/local só após `requestIdleCallback` (poster cobre LCP); `preload="metadata"` - **Home**: import eager (sem tela "Carregando…"); hero sem `framer-motion` (animação CSS) - **Boot**: analytics, service worker e widgets (assist, exit-intent, banner planos) após first paint - **Tablet**: padding e tipografia do hero ajustados no breakpoint 641–1024px ## Validação - `pnpm run ci` — check, lint, test, build, e2e (4/4) ## Deploy Merge em `main` dispara integração Vercel (produção: https://reidasvendas.com.br/).
  
## Summary by CodeRabbit * **Refactor** * Optimized page load performance by deferring non-critical components and tracking until after initial paint. * Simplified hero section animations using CSS-based approaches for improved rendering efficiency. * Consolidated engagement widgets into a unified deferred loading component. * **Style** * Added new CSS entrance animations for hero content with staggered timing effects. [![Review Change Stack](https://storage.googleapis.com/coderabbit_public_assets/review-stack-in-coderabbit-ui.svg)](https://app.coderabbit.ai/change-stack/tpiola/reidasvendas/pull/23?utm_source=github_walkthrough&utm_medium=github&utm_campaign=change_stack)
pr.author: tpiola
